title: Force Update Cluster Edge App Version
content:
# Force Update Cluster Edge App Version

Force available updates to Cluster even if update setting is disabled. Optionally keep a force update action on standby if the Cluster is offline. This ensures the update is applied once the Cluster returns online.

## Endpoint

`POST /orchestration/clusters/{cluster_name}/edge-apps/version/force-update`
summary: Force Update Cluster Edge App Version

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.orchestration.updateOrchestrationClustersEdgeAppsVersionForce()
print(response)

parameters.name: cluster_name
parameters.description: Cluster key `name` to initiate upgrades. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

parameters.name: persist
parameters.description: Optional setting to wait if the Cluster is currently unreachable and force the update when the Cluster is next online.

200.description: Cluster Edge app version forced update succeeded.

202.description: Forced Update initiation accepted by the server. Will send remote request to the Cluster when it next comes online.
